entry.title: IDC N0001915D0003 (P00007) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: DCMA ACO issues oders as delegated by NAVAIR PCO

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGFTHE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ACQUIRE AND EXECUTE A DEACTIVATION PLAN FOR T-34 AIRCRAFT AT NAS CORPUS CHRISTI, TX, ARMY FORT BRAGG, AND HUNTSVILLE SITES UNDER CLIN 0053AA (T-34 SITE ACTIVATION/DEACTIVATION/REACTIVATION). EFFORT REQUIRED TO RELOCATE OR DISPOSE OF MATERIAL IAW PWS PARA 5.13.9. THE NAS CORPUS CHRISTI DEACTIVATION PLAN WILL BE BASED UPON CNATRA OPERATING THE AIRCRAFT UNTIL 15 SEPTEMBER 2015 AT WHICH TIME DEACTIVATION CAN BEGIN. THE ARMY FT. BRAGG SITE WILL OPERATE THE AIRCRAFT UNTIL 30 SEPTEMBER 2015 AT WHICH TIME DEACTIVATION CAN BEGIN. THE ARMY HUNTSVILLE SITE CAN BEGIN DEACTIVATION 1 SEPTEMBER 2015. ALL DEACTIVATIONS SHALL BE COMPLETE BY 31 DECEMBER 2015.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001915D0003 (P00012) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: DCMA ACO issues oders as delegated by NAVAIR PCO

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REALIGN UNIT PRICING FOR SLINS 0X04AA, 0X04AC, 0X04AD AND 0X04AE TO ACCOUNT FOR THE UTILIZATION OF ROVER SERVICES FOR EACH OF THE SATELLITE SITES AT LEMOORE, CA: OCEANA, VA; EL CENTRO, CA; AND MIRAMAR, CA.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001915D0003 (P00013) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: DCMA ACO issues oders as delegated by NAVAIR PCO

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CORRECT SLIN 0118AC TO COST FROM FFP, EXERCISE SLIN 0139AA, CHANGE A/C RANGE ON SLINS 0X39AC FROM 91-110 (AIRCRAFT PER MONTH) TO 99-110 (AIRCRAFT PER MONTH), REPLACE ATTACHMENTS 82 AND 86 DATED 1 JULY 2015 WITH ATTACHMENTS 82 AND 86 DATED 16 NOVEMBER 2015, AND REVISE ATTACHMENT 145 SMALL BUSINESS SUBCONTRACTING PLAN WITH SMALL BUSINESS SUBCONTRACTING PLAN-REVISED TO INCORPORATE SATELLITE SITE MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001915D0003 (P00015) awarded to DYNCORP INTERNATIONAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: DCMA ACO issues oders as delegated by NAVAIR PCO

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF THIS MODIFICATION WILL REVISE THE ESTIMATED QUANTITIES FOR SLINS 0105 THROUGH 0405 (AA, AC, AE, AG AND AJ), REVISE THE TITLES OF SLINS 0105 THROUGH 0405 (AB, AD, AF, AH AND AK) FROM HOLIDAY TO HOLIDAY/SUNDAY, CHANGE CLINS 0114 THROUGH 0414 TO RESERVED, REVISE THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR AMOUNTS FOR SLINS 0118 THROUGH 0418 (AA, AD AND AE), AND REVISE SECTION C DESCRIPTIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
